channel.title: Libby on TATOE - Art Trail Management
channel.description: Recent content in Libby on TATOE - Art Trail Management

item.title: Libby - Page 1
item.description:
Page 1

This is the first private page in the Libby section.

Content

You can put any content here that you want to share with specific people via direct links.

Features

  • Private: Not listed in navigation
  • Accessible: Via direct URL
  • Secure: Only people with the link can find it

Example Content

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

item.title: Libby - Page 2
item.description:
Page 2

This is the second private page in the Libby section.

Private Information

This page can contain any private information you want to share with specific people.

Use Cases

  • Private documentation
  • Internal notes
  • Draft content
  • Personal resources
  • Confidential information

Security Notes

  • Pages are not indexed by search engines
  • Not listed in site navigation
  • Only accessible via direct links
  • Can be password protected at the hosting level if needed

← Back to Libby

item.title: Libby - Page 3
item.description:
Page 3

This is the third private page in the Libby section.

Additional Features

You can customize these pages with any content you need.

Content Types

  • Text content
  • Images (upload to static/images/)
  • Links to external resources
  • Embedded content
  • Downloadable files

Example Structure

content/libby/
├── _index.md          # Main Libby page
├── page1.md           # Private page 1
├── page2.md           # Private page 2
├── page3.md           # Private page 3
├── notes.md           # Private notes
└── resources.md       # Private resources

URL Structure

  • Main page: https://tatoe.co.uk/libby/
  • Page 1: https://tatoe.co.uk/libby/page1/
  • Page 2: https://tatoe.co.uk/libby/page2/
  • Page 3: https://tatoe.co.uk/libby/page3/

← Back to Libby

item.title: Libby - Private Notes
item.description:
Private Notes

This is a private notes page for your personal use.

Quick Notes

You can use this page to store:

  • Meeting notes
  • Ideas and concepts
  • Personal reminders
  • Draft content
  • Private thoughts

Formatting Examples

Lists

  • Bullet points
  • Numbered lists
  • Nested items

Emphasis

Bold text and italic text for emphasis.

Code

// Example code block
function hello() {
    console.log("Hello, Libby!");
}

Links

Link to external site

← Back to Libby

item.title: Libby - Private Resources
item.description:
Private Resources

This page contains private resources and links.

Useful Links

Documentation

  • Hugo Documentation
  • PaperMod Theme

Tools

  • Markdown Guide
  • GitHub

File Uploads

To add files to this section:

  1. Upload files to static/files/ directory
  2. Link to them like this: Download File

Images

To add images:

  1. Upload to static/images/
  2. Reference them:

External Resources

  • Netlify - Hosting platform
  • GitHub - Code repository

← Back to Libby
